full_description:
Project Name:
InDesign & Illustrator Educational Resource Design - Autism Visual Schedule Toolkit

Project Description:
We are seeking a specialized graphic designer with deep experience in educational publishing, instructional design, special education resources, and children's workbook layout to design a premium, print-ready "Autism Independence Toolkit" (Module 1 – Professional Daily Visual Schedule).

This is a comprehensive, commercial-quality project requiring high attention to clean grid structures, consistent design systems, and extreme attention to detail for special education delivery.

PROJECT OVERVIEW
Deliverables: ~40 pages (A4 Landscape, 297×210 mm) of structured daily command centers, routine boards, choice boards, token systems, and daily/monthly component cards.

Iconography: Creation of ~150 custom, cohesive vector icons across multiple categories (Morning, School, Home, Activities, Communication, Rewards, etc.) sharing identical stroke weights, corner radii, and styling.

Technical Specs: 300 DPI, CMYK, 3mm bleed, crop marks, export to Press PDF/X-1a, standard PDF, PNG, and JPEG.

Editable Requirements: Along with the complete packaged Adobe InDesign (.INDD) and Adobe Illustrator (.AI) files, you must deliver a fully editable PowerPoint (.PPTX) translation where all text, icon vectors, boxes, and groupings remain non-flattened and customizable.

DESIGN SYSTEM & QUALITY STANDARDS
Typography: Large, highly readable headings (Poppins Bold) and body text (Nunito) with a minimum font size of 22pt for clarity from a distance.

Color Palette: Soft pastel background tones utilizing specific high-contrast color coding for categories (Green for Routine, Blue for Info, Purple for Choices, Yellow for Rewards, Red for Warnings, Orange for Transitions).

Production Detailing: Every single cutout card must incorporate rounded corner cut guides, perfectly equal margins, and a designated visual dot for Velcro placement.

Benchmark Quality: The final output must match or exceed the layout quality of premium commercial publishing platforms such as Twinkl Premium, Autism Little Learners, PECS materials, and Montessori printables.

TO APPLY:
Please do not send generic portfolios. To be considered, please share 3–5 specific samples of printable educational materials, children’s workbooks, or specialized educational toolkits you have previously laid out in InDesign.

Before I can upload everything to Kindle Direct Publishing, I need a clean, clickable Table of Contents that lists only the main chapter headings, plus professional interior and cover sizing that matches KDP’s latest trim and bleed requirements.

• Convert the Word file into a print-ready interior, embedded fonts and margins optimised for KDP.

full_description:
The site is already live on Squarespace with all copy, images, and branding in place across three core pages plus a contact page. What it still lacks is that final layer of finesse—tight, consistent spacing, balanced typography, and photos and graphic assets/images that sit perfectly within the flow of each section.

My priority is spacing and layout: margins that breathe, sections that align cleanly on desktop and mobile, and a visual rhythm that feels intentional rather than rushed. Fonts and text placement need a once-over so headline hierarchy is clear and body copy remains highly legible. For imagery, I only need a review of placement and sizing; no new photos are required.

All design assets and style guidelines are ready for you inside the Squarespace editor. A focused 2–4 hour session should be enough for you to:

• Adjust section and element spacing for consistency 
• Refine font sizes, line heights, and alignment 
• Re-position or resize existing photos where necessary 

The end result should look like it was crafted by a designer—clean, modern, and cohesive on every screen size. Once you’re done, simply leave comments inside Squarespace noting any significant changes you made so I can trace the edits.

This needs to be applied to both mobile and web pages.

full_description:
We are launching Aura Press, a disruptive, premium press-on nail brand aimed at the global market. We are building a 100% custom, headless-style WordPress/WooCommerce website from scratch—zero bloated templates.

We are looking for a top-tier UI/UX Figma Designer with exceptional aesthetic standards and rich e-commerce experience. Budget is not an issue for the right talent. We are willing to pay premium rates to ensure world-class execution, ultra-high-fidelity visuals (4K-quality sharpness for all vector assets), and absolute visual accuracy.

The Timeline (Strict Deadline):
This is a fast-paced project. The complete website design (both Mobile and PC/Desktop browsers) must be fully delivered and ready for developer handoff by this Friday. Do not apply if you cannot commit to this strict timeline.

The Scope (Complete Website):
You will design the entire user journey for both Mobile (our primary focus) and PC.
Homepage (High-impact visual storytelling).
Collection/Category Pages.
Product Detail Page (PDP) focused on extremely high conversion rates.
Seamless Slide-out Cart & Checkout flow.

The Core Feature: "Smart Sizer" Interactive Tool
This is our unique brand moat. We are building a custom, web-based interactive tool where users can measure their nail size using a physical credit card against their phone screen. You need to design the UI and micro-interactions for this 3-step modal flow:

Step 1: Calibration. A dark overlay appears with a dashed outline of a standard credit card. The user places a real card on their screen and uses a bottom slider to scale the dashed outline until it perfectly matches the real card.
Step 2: Measurement. The screen switches to a semi-transparent thumb outline flanked by two bright, vertical caliper lines (red/neon). The user places their real thumb on the screen and uses the slider to adjust the caliper lines until they align with the edges of their nail.
Step 3: Auto-Match. A smooth success state/micro-animation showing "You are a Size S!" and seamlessly auto-selecting the variant on the PDP.
Note: We need you to design this flow with professional, smooth transitions and ergonomic placement (e.g., ensuring fingers don't block the screen while using sliders).

Requirements:
Proven expertise in Figma (Components, Auto-layout, Variables, and advanced Prototyping).
An outstanding portfolio showcasing custom E-commerce UI/UX (Premium Beauty, Fashion, or Tech accessories).
Deep understanding of responsive design (Mobile-first + Desktop harmony) and conversion rate optimization (CRO).
Ability to deliver flawless, pixel-perfect assets.

To Apply, Please Provide:
A link to your portfolio (highlighting 1-2 custom premium e-commerce sites).
A brief confirmation that you can meet the Friday deadline for the entire scope.

We are looking for a freelance industrial/product designer to help develop an early-stage outdoor lifestyle product concept into clear product drawings and CAD files that can eventually be shared with manufacturers for prototyping and production discussions.

We are still in the concept phase, so we are looking for someone collaborative and creative who can help shape the product direction while also considering practicality, usability, and manufacturability.

Product concept development
Sketches and visual concepts
Product form and structure ideas
Basic mechanism thinking/functionality
3D CAD modelling
Technical/product drawings for manufacturers
Guidance on materials and production feasibility

Experience designing physical consumer products
Strong industrial/product design portfolio
Comfortable creating CAD files and manufacturer-ready drawings

CAD software you use

We are looking for a practical designer who can help bridge the gap between an idea and a manufacturable product, not just visual renders.

full_description:
I need a brand-new Aspen HYSYS model that removes CO₂ from a natural-gas feed by using a monoethanolamine (MEA) solvent system. The scope begins with an empty flowsheet and ends with a working simulation I can build a full design package around.

This study aims to optimise the removal of CO₂ from natural gas using an MEA-based absorption process in Aspen HYSYS. A sensitivity analysis will be carried out by varying key operating parameters, including absorber pressure, absorber temperature, lean MEA circulation rate, and MEA concentration. The effects of these parameters on CO₂ removal efficiency, energy consumption (reboiler duty), solvent circulation requirements, and overall operating cost will be evaluated to determine the optimum operating conditions.

full_description:
I’m building an indie game and need a complete modular kit that lets me snap together a medieval dungeon in-engine. The visual direction is Semi-realistic/fantasy: think stylised forms with enough surface detail and believable materials to feel immersive without chasing photorealism. 

Scope 
You’ll create both Environment pieces and Props/Objects. Walls, floors, arches and stair segments should tile cleanly, while props such as torches, barrels, chains and altar-like set dressing bring life to the scene. I have references ready; once you see them you’re free to push the look in new, creative directions that still fit the core theme. 

Preferred workflow uses Blender (open to Maya, Max) with PBR textures authored in Substance or similar. Keep topology game-friendly and logical for LODs. 

Deliverables 
• Modular dungeon set (.blend + Glb) 
• Textures (2K–4K: base-color, normal, roughness, metallic) 
• Simple assembled demo scene to prove modularity 
• Read-me with naming conventions and scale info (metric, 1 unit = 1 m)

Acceptance criteria: each piece grid-aligns, no visible seams once tiled, average prop under 500 tris, and everything imports into Godot without material errors.

Tell me roughly how many unique modules you expect to provide and any questions about style or technical targets, and we can lock the final asset list before you dive in.

I need a sharp closer who can open doors and keep them open with decision-makers looking for custom banking software. My studio builds end-to-end solutions—core banking platforms, loan origination tools, mobile banking apps—and I’m ready to reward the person or team who can put qualified prospects in front of me.

Your main channel will be proactive cold calling. I’ll supply case studies, battle-tested pitch decks, and a direct line to our technical architects for any deep-dive questions that come up. • Direct contact (phone + email) for a stakeholder who controls or strongly influences software procurement at a bank, credit union, or fintech.

• Agreement to a discovery call with me or my CTO.

I track everything through HubSpot; once a lead reaches the agreed-upon milestone, your commission is released immediately—no waiting for the final project close.

full_description:
I’m launching a fresh YouTube channel built around personality-driven vlogs and I need an editor who can take each episode from concept to upload-ready. Because I don’t have any raw footage yet, you’ll start by helping source or capture material—stock clips, screen-grabs, motion graphics, even short selfie segments if you can record them—then blend everything into a cohesive, story-first vlog that feels spontaneous, upbeat and personal.

The tone I’m after is classic YouTube vlog: quick cuts, jump-cuts that keep the pace high, tasteful zooms, on-screen text for emphasis, light colour grading, royalty-free music and sound-effects, plus lower thirds that match a clean, modern palette. I’d like to release one video a week, roughly 8–10 minutes long, exported in 1080p (or 4K if you prefer) and ready for immediate upload.

Deliverables I’ll be looking for:
• Final video file (MP4, H.264) + project file 
• Custom thumbnail and three title suggestions 
• Timestamped description draft with chapter markers 
• One round of revisions included per video

Any mainstream toolset—Premiere Pro, Final Cut, DaVinci Resolve—is fine as long as you can maintain consistent quality and quick turnaround. When you reply, please send links to recent vlog-style edits, outline the workflow you’d follow from sourcing footage to final delivery, and let me know how you’d structure milestones so the channel can scale smoothly.

StrongBodyAI is an AI-powered platform that supports healthcare and wellness professionals in expanding their digital presence and connecting with global opportunities. We are currently seeking Freelance Healthcare Recruitment Partners to support our growth in Turkey.

full_description:
Recreate & Vectorize Existing Nonprofit Animal Logo (Illustrator Needed)
________________________________________
We are a small 501(c)(3) nonprofit animal welfare organization called Alpha's Friends. We already have a logo that we love and do not want it redesigned. Instead, we are looking for an experienced graphic designer/illustrator to professionally recreate it as high-quality vector artwork while preserving its overall appearance and identity.
Project Overview
Our current logo has two issues:
• The resolution is too low for professional printing.
• The three animals are illustrated in different artistic styles. One animal is based on a realistic photo while the other two have a more cartoon-like appearance.
We would like the logo professionally redrawn so that all three animals share a cohesive artistic style while remaining instantly recognizable. The personalities and unique features of each animal are very important to us.
This logo will be used on:
• T-shirts
• Mugs
• Hats
• Stickers
• Banners
• Business cards
• Website
• Social media
• Promotional materials
The finished logo must look excellent at both very small and very large sizes.
Requirements
• Recreate the existing logo as clean vector artwork (not simply increase the resolution)
• Keep the existing layout and overall design
• Make the three animals visually consistent in style
• Preserve the recognizable facial features and personalities of each animal
• Clean up line work, proportions, and colors where appropriate
• Produce artwork suitable for professional printing
Deliverables
Please provide:
• Editable Adobe Illustrator (.AI)
• SVG
• EPS
• Vector PDF
• High-resolution transparent PNG (minimum 5000 px)
• High-resolution JPG
• Full-color version
• Black version
• White version
Please convert all text to outlines or include the font information if licensing allows.
Ownership
Upon completion and payment, all copyright and commercial rights will be transferred to Alpha's Friends.
To Apply
Please include:
• Examples of logo recreation or vector illustration work
• Examples of animal illustrations (preferred)
• Confirmation that you create original vector artwork rather than using AI upscaling software
We are looking for someone with excellent attention to detail who enjoys creating warm, expressive animal illustrations. This logo represents our nonprofit and will be used for many years, so quality is very important to us.
As part of your proposal, please redraw only Alpha's (grey cat) face (not the entire logo) in the style you envision. This will help us evaluate whether your artistic style matches our vision before awarding the project.

CONDUCT A RESEARCH PROJECT WITH THE FOLLOWING REQUIREMENTS:

YOU MUST BE A LOCAL OF THE UAE

Targeted party(s)/Individual: 1 Company and 1 Individual
 
PLEASE FIND THE JOB DESCRIPTION & REQUIREMENTS BELOW:
The PTR is required to conduct checks on the provided individual(s), company, or party name(s). The checks should cover litigation, bankruptcy, insolvency, media, and adverse news records.
 
Scope of Work:
Conduct litigation checks through relevant local official court sources in both the native/local language and English.
Conduct bankruptcy and insolvency checks through relevant local official bankruptcy, insolvency, government, or registry sources in both the native/local language and English.
Conduct media and adverse news checks through local and national news media, official announcements, and other reliable public sources in both the native/local language and English.
The PTR should identify any relevant records, including but not limited to:
Court or legal cases where the provided individual(s), company, or party name(s) is involved as plaintiff, defendant, claimant, respondent, debtor, creditor, or any other related party;
Bankruptcy, insolvency, liquidation, restructuring, or similar filings, announcements, or judgments;
Significant media or adverse news relating to the provided individual(s), company, or party name(s).

All checks should cover the last 10 years.
PROJECT DURATION:
4–8 hours maximum
 
REQUIRED SKILLSETS:
Experience in internet research, especially using local official sources;
Experience in legal checks or law;
Strong proficiency in both the local language and English.
 
DELIVERY ELEMENTS:
Completed Confirmis’ template; the PTR must provide a summary following the required template provided by Confirmis.
The PTR must provide supporting sources for all findings, such as:
Official source links;
News/media links;
Screenshots of the search results or relevant pages;
Original judgments, court documents, or registry documents, especially where the official link is inaccessible or cannot be directly opened.

If no relevant records are found, the PTR must clearly state the sources checked, keywords used, search date, and confirm that no records were identified.



Note: Milestone will be released the following week (Monday) after the job completion to give us time to organize the report and contact you if we need additional clarification.

full_description:
We require a Registered Professional Engineer of Queensland (RPEQ) to provide the design for a reinforced concrete, above ground, free standing, rectangular swimming pool which MUST utilize the Rise Wall Lay-Flat Water Resistant formwork system as primary construction method.

Preference will be given to an engineer who is experienced with both the Rise Wall Lay-Flat formwork system as well as basic swimming pool design utilizing steel reinforced concrete.

The pool must be free standing, above-ground and totally self supporting - founded on suitably compacted substrate (ie crusher dust) WITHOUT the need to be tied to or reliant upon any other support, structure or foundation. It must be designed to withstand the static and dynamic loadings associated with swimming pools and should incorporate a proven reinforcing design utilizing standard deformed steel reinforcing bars placed in a configuration that works with the Rise Wall Lay-Flat Water Resistant formwork product.

The successful Registered Professional Engineer of Queensland (RPEQ) shall certify their finished design as provided as a mandate in this project. Design must be prepared in accordance with the following Australian Standards: AS. 3600 - governing all concrete structures. AS 2783:2025 - Use of reinforced concrete for small swimming pools.

KEY SPECIFICATIONS ARE AS FOLLOWS:

1. The simple rectangular concrete pool will consist of a single structure composed of a floor slab with four integrated vertical perimeter walls all formed by way of a single, in-situ monolithic pour carried out on site. The monolithic pour is essential to provide a homogenous concrete vessel taking the form of an open-topped rectangular concrete box.

2. The vertical walls will be nominally 200 mm thickness (as determined by the Rise Wall Lay-Flat - Water Resistant formwork product). 

3. The floor slab thickness (also likely to be approximately 200 mm thick) will be determined by the REPQ. It is intended that the entire pool shell be founded on a level bed of compacted crusher dust (or other suitable packing sand material) covered by a suitable polythene vapour barrier.

4. Internal pool dimensions are 8000 mm length x 3500 mm width with a constant wall height above floor level of 1500 mm.

It is imperative that the following points are inclusions in the design: 

(a) That all internal corners of the shell are designed as sharp ninety-degree corners (not filleted, beveled or radiused corners).

(b) Focus should be placed heavily on NOT over designing the steel reinforcing but rather adhering to traditional and proven reinforcing sizes and methodology.

(c) Pool shell substrate criteria to be determined by RPEQ based on Geotechnical Report for the site that will be provided to the RPEQ whose offer is successful.

(d) No allowance should be made for steps, ladders, seating, plumbing penetrations, pumping equipment, plumbing, valving and filtration equipment, sanitization equipment or other pool equipment generally - all of which is provided by others. 


SCOPE OF WORK TO BE PROVIDED BY RPEQ:

(i) Engineering design for the monolithic Reinforced Concrete Swimming Pool Shell detailing all dimensions, elevations and sectional details and complete concrete specifications. All submissions should be in .pdf format - printable in A4 & A3 size and original Acad .dwg files are to be provided.

(ii) Engineering design for steel reinforcing including a full layout and complete materials take off. Details should clearly show all critical aspects of reinforcing placement, fixing and concrete cover.

(iii) A layout, set up details and procedures for placement, erecting and bracing the Rise Wall Lay-Flat Water Resistant formwork as well as a complete formwork take off schedule and bill of quantities for ordering. The layout should note all necessary fixings, ties, required panel cuts as well as any additional materials required aside from the Rise Wall Lay-Flat Water Resistant formwork. It is essential to clearly demonstrate how the Rise Wall panels integrate with the steel reinforcement cage and the order of steps and procedures needed to set up the formwork ready for pouring.

full_description:
I need a responsive, fully-functional gamified educational website that offers separate dashboards for administrators and students. The platform must handle complete course management, host active user forums, and track learner progress in real time. Courses will mix videos, text lessons, and quizzes or other assessments, so the architecture has to support multiple media types without performance dips on mobile or desktop.

Core flow 
• Administrators create and organise courses, upload video or text material, build quizzes, set passing scores, and monitor overall cohort analytics. 
• Students enrol, move through lesson sequences, discuss topics in forums, and see their personal progress bar update automatically after each activity. 

Key requirements 
1. Modern, responsive UI that passes Lighthouse mobile audits. 
2. Secure registration, login, and role-based access control. 
3. Intuitive admin dashboard with bulk upload for course assets. 
4. Student dashboard showing enrolled courses, progress percentage, and upcoming deadlines. 
5. Discussion boards tied to each course or module. 
6. Assessment engine supporting timed quizzes, automatic grading, and score storage. 
7. Clean REST or GraphQL API layer so future mobile apps can plug in easily. 
8. Documentation covering environment setup, deployment, and basic admin tasks.

Acceptance criteria 
• All listed features work on Chrome, Firefox, Safari, and Edge, both desktop and mobile. 
• Page load <3 s on a 4G connection with typical course assets. 
• Code is pushed to a private Git repository with clear commit history. 
• Final hand-off includes a brief video walkthrough of both dashboards.

If you’re comfortable building an LMS from the ground up—whether with React & Node, Laravel, Django, or another modern stack—let’s discuss timelines and milestones.

cleaned_text: مصمم محترف لاعداد كتالوج منتجات العاب اطفال 151 صنف مطلوب مستقل محترف لديه خبره تصميم كتالوجات المنتجات، لاعداد قالب احترافي قابل للتعديل وادخال بيانات وصور عدد 151 صنفا العاب الاطفال تشمل المهمه تنسيق الصور والمعلومات بشكل احترافي، والبحث عبر الانترنت صور او بيانات مناسبه حال كانت المواد المرسله واضحه او ناقصه سيتم تزويد المستقل بنموذج نهايي يوضح الشكل المطلوب، ويشترط وجود اعمال سابقه مشابهه يثبت الخبره، الالتزام بالدقه وجوده التصميم، ستكون الاولويه لاصحاب الخبره تصميم كتالوجات المنتجات فوتوشوب تصميم جرافيك تعديل الصور adobe illustrator البحث علي الانترنت التصميم الابداعي unknown
full_description: مطلوب مستقل محترف لديه خبرة في تصميم كتالوجات المنتجات، لإعداد قالب احترافي قابل للتعديل وإدخال بيانات وصور عدد 151 صنفًا من ألعاب الأطفال. تشمل المهمة تنسيق الصور والمعلومات بشكل احترافي، والبحث عبر الإنترنت عن صور أو بيانات مناسبة في حال كانت المواد المرسلة غير واضحة أو ناقصة. سيتم تزويد المستقل بنموذج نهائي يوضح الشكل المطلوب، ويشترط وجود أعمال سابقة مشابهة يثبت الخبرة، مع الالتزام بالدقة وجودة التصميم، حيث ستكون الأولوية لأصحاب الخبرة في تصميم كتالوجات المنتجات.
